title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 28 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 28 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 28 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/02/2022
DCE iron ore futures rose largely today. the main contract closed 705.5, an increase of 2.69% throughout the day. the quotation in themorning was increased by 20-30 yuan/mt from last Friday.
